# Rich Pipeline Comparison — Trevor GSIB vs Perplexity Benchmark

**Date:** 2026-05-10
**Generated by:** Pipeline run with enriched prompts + map/visual quality improvements

---

## 1. Page Count Comparison

| Metric | Perplexity | Trevor GSIB | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| Total pages | 32 | 25 | −7 (78%) |
| Sections covered | 6 | 6 | Match |
| File size | 10.0 MB | 1.7 MB | −83% |

**Assessment:** Our PDF is 7 pages shorter because the Perplexity brief uses more full-page imagery spreads. Both cover all 6 theatre sections (Europe, Asia, Middle East, North America, South/Central America, Global Finance).

---

## 2. Content Depth Comparison

| Metric | Perplexity | Trevor GSIB | Ratio |
|---|---|---|---|
| Total characters | 72,968 | 57,197 | 0.78× |
| Total words | 11,502 | 11,110 | **0.97×** |
| Word density (words/page) | 359 | 444 | 1.24× |

**Section-level narrative depth (Trevor GSIB):**
- Europe: 3,302 chars, 3 KJs
- Asia: 3,484 chars, 3 KJs
- Middle East: 3,580 chars, 3 KJs
- North America: 3,416 chars, 3 KJs
- South/Central America: 3,856 chars, 3 KJs
- Global Finance: 3,223 chars, 3 KJs

**Assessment:** Word count shows 97% parity — our prose depth is very close to Perplexity. The character count gap (78%) suggests Perplexity uses more tabular data, charts, and visual elements (which have high character counts from numeric data). Narrative content is comparable.

---

## 3. Visual Quality Assessment

### Embedded Image Analysis

| Aspect | Perplexity | Trevor GSIB |
|---|---|---|
| **Embedded images** | 30+ (incl. charts, maps, photography) | 7 (1 cover + 6 maps) |
| **Cover image** | 8192×8192 px (964 ppi) | 2048×2048 px (186 ppi) |
| **Theatre map res** | 2000-2800 px wide (580-812 ppi) | 1181-1185 px wide (157-158 ppi) |
| **Image density** | 313 KB/page avg | 69 KB/page avg |
| **Maps present** | Yes (embedded in PDF) | Yes (6 theatre maps) |
| **AI-generated section images** | No (uses stock image library) | Yes — 7 GenViral Studio AI images generated |
| **Map renderer** | Proprietary high-res cartography | matplotlib + Natural Earth (MAPBOX_TOKEN not available) |

### What's Working Well
- **Cover image:** 2048×2048 GenViral AI cover embedded successfully via WeasyPrint
- **Theatre maps:** All 6 maps render with proper location markers, gold accents, and dark theme
- **Section images:** All 7 GenViral AI images generated successfully (URLs in section-images.json)
- **Design consistency:** Magazine-quality layout, dark theme, gold accents, classification markers

### What Needs Improvement
1. **Low map resolution:** Maps at 1181px wide (157 ppi) vs Perplexity's 2000-2800px (580-812 ppi). **Fix:** Set `MAPBOX_TOKEN` to enable Mapbox Static API @2x (2400px) renders.
2. **Missing embedded section images (maps used as hero instead):** Renderer uses maps as primary hero images; GenViral AI section images are configured as fallback. Should use AI images as primary, maps as secondary.
3. **Perplexity uses stock photography vs our AI-generated:** Perplexity's images are photographic — crisper, more realistic. Our GenViral images vary in quality.
4. **No data visualizations:** Perplexity includes charts/tables/visualizations. We produce narratives without embedded visual data.
5. **GenViral image loading:** Remote URLs from vireel.io may have CORS/auth issues with WeasyPrint's URL fetcher. Cover loaded successfully, but section images depend on Mapbox maps being the hero.

---

## 4. What Still Needs Work

### Priority 1 — MAPBOX_TOKEN (Critical for Map Quality)
- **Problem:** No Mapbox API token found in `.env` or `~/.openclaw/secrets/`. Fallback to matplotlib produces adequate but low-resolution maps.
- **Fix needed:** Acquire a Mapbox access token and save it as `MAPBOX_TOKEN` in `.env`.
- **Impact:** With the token, maps would render at 2400×1600px @2x via the Mapbox Static API (`/static/{lng},{lat},{zoom},{bearing},{pitch}/{width}x{height}@2x`), providing professional-quality styled maps.
- **Script ready:** `scripts/generate_maps_mapbox.py` already implements the Mapbox API renderer with graceful fallback.

### Priority 2 — AI Image Embedding
- **Problem:** GenViral section images are generated but the renderer uses maps as primary hero images. The AI images only appear if maps are missing.
- **Fix:** Modify `render_brief_magazine.py` to:
  1. Download GenViral images at render time (base64 embed or WeasyPrint URL fetcher)
  2. Use AI imagery as primary hero, maps as secondary visual elements
  3. Add image download with auth headers if needed

### Priority 3 — Data Visualizations
- **Problem:** Zero embedded charts, tables, or data visualizations.
- **Fix needed:** Integrate `scripts/generate_brief_charts.py` (or similar) to produce Kalshi prediction market trend lines, oil futures charts, and incident timeline charts. Embed as SVG/PNG in the PDF.

### Priority 4 — Image Resolution
- **Problem:** All embedded images at 150-186 ppi vs Perplexity's 580-964 ppi. At 200dpi print, our images would appear noticeably pixelated.
- **Fix:** Target minimum 300 ppi for all embedded images. Increase matplotlib figure DPI from 150 to 300.

---

## 5. Summary Scorecard

| Category | Score (1-10) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Content depth** | 8/10 | 97% word parity with Perplexity |
| **Page count** | 7/10 | 25 vs 32 pages — need more visual spreads |
| **Cover design** | 7/10 | Good AI cover but lower resolution |
| **Maps** | 5/10 | Adequate but low-res; Mapbox would jump to 8/10 |
| **Section imagery** | 6/10 | AI images generated but mostly unused as heroes |
| **Data viz** | 2/10 | Essentially none |
| **Typography/Layout** | 8/10 | Strong magazine aesthetic |
| **File size** | 9/10 | 1.7 MB is web-friendly and deliverable |

**Overall: 6.5/10** — Functionally solid, visually approaching Perplexity quality. The gap is primarily in: (a) map resolution, (b) embedded AI imagery, and (c) data visualizations.

---

## 6. Technical Details

### Pipeline Performance
- Pipeline collection: ~1s
- Pipeline analysis (LLM): ~223s (3.7 min)
- Map generation (matplotlib fallback): ~5s
- Image generation (GenViral): ~180s (3 min)
- PDF rendering (WeasyPrint): ~5s
- **Total pipeline time:** ~7-8 minutes

### Files Generated
- **PDF:** `~/trevor-briefings/2026-05-10/final/GSIB-2026-05-10-rich.pdf` (1.7 MB, 25 pages)
- **Maps:** 6 PNG files in `visuals/maps/`
- **Images:** 7 GenViral AI images (cover + 6 sections)
- **Analysis:** 7 JSON analysis files in `analysis/`

### Mapbox Status
- `MAPBOX_TOKEN`: **NOT FOUND** — check `.env`, `~/.openclaw/secrets/`, or `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`
- When set: Mapbox Static API uses dark-v11 style, renders at 1200x800@2x (2400x1600 effective)
- Fallback: matplotlib with Natural Earth land data (works, lower quality)
